name: Mustard Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Salt (omit for low sodium diet)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry mustard and 1 tablespoon water in a small container until smooth. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. In the top of a double boiler, combine flour, salt, and cayenne pepper.
3. Combine beaten egg yolks, 3/4 cup water, and mustard. Add to the dry ingredients mixture and stir well.
4. Cook over simmering water, stirring occasionally, for 10 minutes or until thick and smooth.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in vinegar and any additional seasoning.
6. Pour into a half-pint jar. Cover tightly and chill.
7. One serving contains: 2 grams carbohydrate, 1 gram protein, 1 gram fat, and 20 calories (with salt). Up to 2 tablespoons may be considered "free."
